Appearances:
Robert Lehman, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Larry Perez is present.
Attorney, Tarek Sorensen representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set
